title: fix(doc): correction of the example for the registry at the login
body:
Fix a long standing bug in docs / function comment.

IMO this was an oversight at:
- #196 

The example "https://quay.io/v" is part of `registry: URL for registry access. For example,` and not from `dockercfg_path`.
